title: Gateway timeout under batch sync load
body: Synthetic issue for gateway workers saturating during enterprise batch sync.

title: SSO metadata cache does not refresh after rotation
body: Synthetic issue for stale IdP metadata after customer rotation.

title: Renewal ledger includes inactive seats
body: Synthetic issue for duplicate seat charges during renewal invoice generation.
resolution_summary: Inactive seats are filtered before renewal invoice creation.

title: Contact sync skips records with blank external IDs
body: Synthetic issue for CRM contact update events skipped by sync worker.

title: Export worker memory pressure on large CSV jobs
body: Synthetic issue for large CSV export jobs stopping before completion.

title: Device trust rule blocks promoted admins
body: Synthetic issue for MFA enrollment failures after admin role promotion.
resolution_summary: Admin MFA policy refresh resolves enrollment for promoted users.

title: Burst quota cache resets slowly after traffic spike
body: Synthetic issue for 429 responses below contracted burst quota.
resolution_summary: Quota cache refresh was forced and burst limits returned to contract values.

title: Pilot cancellation refund workflow needs clearer status
body: Synthetic issue for pilot refund status visibility.
resolution_summary: Support guidance added for pilot refund eligibility.

title: Billing owner role cache fails after permission migration
body: Synthetic issue for portal access blocked after billing role update.
resolution_summary: Role cache was invalidated for affected billing owners.

title: Archived export retention copy is unclear
body: Synthetic issue for data retention text in export UI.
resolution_summary: Retention guidance is referenced from export settings.

title: Legacy OAuth apps skipped by token expiry alert job
body: Synthetic issue for missing alert before Salesforce token expiration.
resolution_summary: Alert job now includes legacy OAuth application records.

title: Webhook callback queue delayed during peak traffic
body: Synthetic issue for delayed outbound webhook notifications.
resolution_summary: Worker pool scaled and backlog drained.

title: SCIM group mapping targets retired role identifier
body: Synthetic issue for SCIM role assignments not updating after group sync.
resolution_summary: Mapping rule was changed to the current role identifier.

title: Credit memo status missing from customer portal
body: Synthetic issue for credit memo approval visibility.
resolution_summary: Support shared status while portal display backlog remains tracked.

title: LATAM cache warmup disabled after deploy
body: Synthetic issue for regional latency above baseline after deployment.
resolution_summary: Regional cache warmup was restored for LATAM workers.

title: Sandbox OAuth callback uses production allowlist
body: Synthetic issue for sandbox authorization callback mismatch.
resolution_summary: Sandbox callback allowlist was corrected.

title: Scheduled exports omit custom field schema
body: Synthetic issue for missing custom fields in scheduled exports.
resolution_summary: Custom field schema flag is included in scheduled export jobs.

title: Lost device reset flow needs clearer audit trail
body: Synthetic issue for documenting secure MFA resets.
resolution_summary: Reset flow completed with verification record.

title: Payment route health checks fail after gateway deploy
body: Synthetic issue for Sev1 payment API outage during gateway deploy.

title: ERP connector regenerates idempotency key on retry
body: Synthetic issue for duplicate order creation during retry.
resolution_summary: Retry flow now preserves idempotency keys.

title: Weekly export schedule help article requested
body: Synthetic issue for adding schedule examples to data export docs.
resolution_summary: Support provided schedule steps for weekly exports.

title: Tax exemption upload guidance missing from invoice email
body: Synthetic issue for tax exemption documentation workflow.
resolution_summary: Customer received tax exemption upload instructions.

title: Retired API key alias remains in deploy environment
body: Synthetic issue for failed deployments after API key rotation.
resolution_summary: Deployment alias was updated to the rotated key.

title: Edge stale session after auth policy refresh
body: Synthetic issue for browser specific stale login sessions.
resolution_summary: Support provided session cookie reset workaround.

title: Slack channel mapping cache not invalidated
body: Synthetic issue for alerts sent to default Slack channel.
resolution_summary: Channel mapping cache invalidation was restored.

title: SLA credit timeline needs latency incident correlation
body: Synthetic issue for linking API latency incidents to billing credit review.

title: Export API pagination token dropped after first page
body: Synthetic issue for partial data export through paginated API.

title: Invite permission flag missing for new admin role
body: Synthetic issue for new admins unable to invite teammates.

title: Payment integration disconnects after token refresh
body: Synthetic issue for repeated payment integration disconnects.

title: Billing contact change flow needs clearer handoff
body: Synthetic issue for billing contact change documentation.
